candidates.notes: RepSim PCA sweep at pilot scale (N=100). Knees (within 3pp): {'toxicity': 128, 'counterfact': 16, 'ftrace': 16}. Pilot limitation: N=100 caps max PCA components; k >= ~130 falls back to full dim. Full-scale should reveal true saturation point.

pilot_limitations: N=100 caps PCA max_components to ~129 (varies by task pool size); k>max_components falls back to full d=2048
At pilot scale saturation may appear earlier (fewer samples = lower effective rank)
Bootstrap CIs may be wide with small ref sets
